meta.name: v1_finance_qa_10
meta.description: 10-question constrained finance QA dataset derived from financial content tables and statements inside the two allowed Tesla PDFs.
derivation_notes: Questions are sourced only from the two approved files.
No external corpus or internet data is used.
Answers are grounded in explicit finance rows from Financial Summary, Financial Statements, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow sections.
Primary grounding references used while authoring include Q3 deck pages 4, 6, 23, 24 and Q4/FY deck pages 4, 5, 6, 28, 29, 31.

items.question: In the Q3 2025 financial summary, what is total revenues (in millions of USD)?
In the Q3 2025 financial summary, what is energy generation and storage revenue (in millions of USD)?
What is total vehicle deliveries in Q3 2025?
On the Q3 2025 balance sheet, what is cash, cash equivalents and investments (in millions of USD)?
In Q3 2025 cash flows from operating activities, what is depreciation, amortization and impairment (in millions of USD)?
In the Q4 2025 quarterly financial summary, what is total revenues (in millions of USD)?
In FY 2025 financial summary, what is total revenues (in millions of USD)?
In FY 2025 financial summary, what is energy generation and storage revenue (in millions of USD)?
In Q4 2025 financial statements, what is net income attributable to common stockholders (GAAP) (in millions of USD)?
On the 31-Dec-25 balance sheet, what is cash, cash equivalents and investments (in millions of USD)?
